title: 2 Pack A4 Black Plastic Document Folder Waterproof Wallet Folder with Pocket, Translucent File Envelope Folder with Button Closure for Home Office School (Black)
features: LARGE CAPACITY: The transparent file pouch is bigger than A4 size, 31 x 24cm / 12.2'' x 9.45''; the poly envelops can be expandable for larger capacity. Approximately 800 sheets of paper can be stored.
HIGH QUALITY: Made of quality polypropylene, non-toxic and environmentally friendly, tear proof and water resistant.
UNIQUE DESIGN: Snap button closure to keep documents secure; ID window is wide enough to insert a standard sized business card; the translucent surface of A4 plastic wallet keep contents visible.
MULTIFUNCTIONAL: Perfect for daily use, such as school subjects, office files, traveling A4 files, business card and cosmetic storage, simple and fashion.
100% MONEY BACK: If there is any problems to make you unsatisfied with our products, SHANQ provides full money refund or replacement.
